info.name: ERP - Communication APIs (Production Level)
info.description: Production-ready Postman Collection for the School ERP Communication module. Includes Authentication, Notifications, SMS, Email, Circulars, Parent Communication, and Event Reminders with dynamic variable capturing, automated test assertions, patch requests, and realistic response examples.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Endpoints to manage authentication tokens, refresh sessions, check user profile, and log out.

request.description: Authenticate user and get JWT access and refresh tokens. Saves token, userId, and schoolId to collection variables.

item.name: Notifications

item.name: Email Logs
item.description: Send single or bulk HTML/plain text emails, check delivery states, and verify metadata/attachments.
